what_was_done: Built Telegram voice-to-text integration: voice messages transcribed via faster-whisper (turbo model, CPU) and injected into Claude Code tmux pane via send-keys. Implemented incremental wrapup code indexing (diffs boot commit hash vs HEAD, only re-indexes changed files). Cleaned up dead dashboard auto-start code from boot_pkg after dashboard/tui deletion.
next_steps: Optimize whisper transcription speed (GPU/quantization or smaller model)
Verify config.json toggles survive task reset
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
Whisper turbo on CPU: ~35s for 2-7s audio (acceptable but slow)
